content:
✔ Allows real-time updates—students see evolving game elements as they unfold.

📜 2. Macro Course Structure – Weekly Breakdown (Weeks 1-15)

Each week follows a consistent structural format, incorporating ALL agreed-upon elements:

✔ A. Thematic Structure & Weekly Overview
• Literary Movement & Art Historical Period
• Historical Anchor (3 Timepoints: Before, Contemporary, Future Echo)
• Interdisciplinary Lenses (Healthcare & Another Discipline)
• Meta-Level Narrative Theme (Story Structure & Hero’s Journey Tie-In)

✔ B. In-Class Components
• Work & Family Discussion (Concrete Lens)
• Historical Anchor & Core Questions (Abstract Lens)
• Medium is the Message – How Technology Shapes Literature
• Building the Literary Toolkit (Key Terms & Techniques)
• Storytelling Across Mediums (Film, Music, Art Tie-In)
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 427 (chunk 427/555)
